item.title: 受战争影响，美国柴油价格突破每加仑5美元
item.description: 受伊朗局势持续扰乱供应的影响，美国柴油价格自2022年12月以来首次突破每加仑5美元大关，给这个全球最大经济体的广大领域带来了进一步压力。【原文：US diesel rose above $5 a gallon for the first time since December 2022 as the war in Iran continued to disrupt supplies, placing further pressure on broad swaths of the world’s largest economy.】

item.title: 欧洲的绿色能源革命缓解了伊朗能源价格冲击
item.description: 欧洲电力市场正面临自2022年能源危机以来首次严峻的地缘政治压力测试——而迄今为止，市场仍保持稳定。【原文：Europe’s power market is facing its first serious geopolitical stress test since the 2022 energy crisis — and, so far, it’s holding up.】

item.title: 香港船只罕见地经霍尔木兹海峡驶入波斯湾
item.description: 一艘香港籍散货船刚刚经霍尔木兹海峡驶入波斯湾，这在当前仅有少数船只得以安全通过该水道、且其中大部分都获得了伊朗批准的情况下，实属罕见。【原文：A Hong Kong-owned bulk carrier has just entered the Persian Gulf via the Strait of Hormuz, a rare occurrence at a time when only a handful of vessels are safely transiting the waterway, most of them with Iran’s approval.】

item.title: 中东战事将加剧欧洲企业困境的恶化
item.description: 据阿尔瓦雷斯与马萨尔公司（Alvarez & Marsal Inc.）称，中东地区战事的爆发以及能源成本的飙升，预计将加剧欧洲企业日益严重的财务困境。【原文：The outbreak of hostilities in the Middle East and surging energy costs are expected to exacerbate soaring levels of financial distress among European corporates, according to Alvarez & Marsal Inc.】

item.title: 随着伊朗局势未见缓和迹象，印度经济增长面临风险
item.description: 随着伊朗战争持续，飙升的油价和严重的燃气短缺正对印度经济产生连锁反应，扰乱了各行业，促使分析师下调经济增长预期，并警告通胀将加剧。【原文：Surging oil prices and acute gas shortages are rippling through India’s economy as the Iran war drags on, disrupting industries and prompting analysts to cut growth forecasts while warning of rising inflation.】

item.title: 阿联酋主要石油枢纽暂停装船，因战事导致的停运事件不断增加
item.description: 据一名航运代理和一位知情人士透露，阿联酋的关键港口富查伊拉已暂停装油作业。此前，该国唯一一条位于霍尔木兹海峡之外的原油出口航线曾遭遇一系列与战争相关的袭击，此次暂停装油是最新一次中断。【原文：The key port of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates has suspended oil loadings, according to a shipping agent and a person familiar with the matter, the latest halt after a series of earlier war-related strikes on the country’s only crude oil export route outside the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 瑞士国家银行行长马丁·施莱格尔的年薪现为120万美元
item.description: 瑞士国家银行行长马丁·施莱格尔在2025年的薪酬为986,200瑞士法郎（120万美元），这使他继续跻身全球薪酬最高的央行行长之列。【原文：Swiss National Bank President Martin Schlegel received a salary of 986,200 Swiss francs ($1.2 million) in 2025, ensuring he remains one of the world’s best-paid central bank chiefs.】

item.title: 受中东局势紧张影响，富时100指数料将下跌，英镑走软
瑞士央行在承诺不干预汇率后未进行外汇干预
item.description: 2025年最后三个月，瑞士国家银行基本未介入外汇市场，此前该行曾向美国承诺不会为了获取经济利益而操纵瑞郎汇率，因此避免了干预行动。【原文：The Swiss National Bank largely kept out of currency markets in the final three months of 2025, avoiding interventions after it promised to the US not to steer the franc for an economic advantage.】

item.title: 印度应将外汇储备目标定为1万亿美元，前印度央行副行长表示
item.description: 据一位前央行官员称，印度需要至少1万亿美元的外汇储备缓冲，以确保具备强大的干预能力。【原文：India needs a forex reserve buffer of at least $1 trillion to ensure robust intervention capacity, according to a former central bank official.】

item.title: 三星将在上市三个月后停售售价2899美元的三折屏手机
item.description: 三星电子公司正在逐步停止其Galaxy Z TriFold智能手机的销售，该机型上市仅约三个月。这表明，这款售价2899美元的设备从一开始就更多地被视为一项技术展示，而非该公司移动产品线的核心产品。【原文：Samsung Electronics Co. is winding down sales of its Galaxy Z TriFold smartphone after roughly three months on the market, suggesting the $2,899 device was always intended as more of a technological showcase than a cornerstone of the company’s mobile lineup.】

item.title: 中国党报敦促苹果修正“垄断性”政策
item.description: 就在这家iPhone制造商同意大幅降低中国应用商店费用这一重大让步之后数日，中国执政党旗舰报纸指出，苹果公司需要放宽应用商店的限制，并纠正“垄断”行为。【原文：Apple Inc. needs to ease app store restrictions and fix “monopolistic” practices, the Chinese ruling party’s flagship newspaper said just days after the iPhone maker agreed to cut local app store fees in a major concession.】

item.title: 美国敦促世贸组织确保全球互联网永久免关税
item.description: 美国正推动将电子商务关税的国际禁令永久化，这为本月晚些时候在世界贸易组织部长级会议上就美国在全球数字服务和数据流动领域的霸权地位展开辩论奠定了基础。【原文：The US is pushing to make permanent an international ban on tariffs on ecommerce, setting the stage for a debate on America’s global dominance of digital services and data flows at the World Trade Organization’s ministerial later this month.】

item.title: 老互助保险凭借南非和马拉维市场的增长，利润持续飙升
item.description: 老互助集团有限公司（Old Mutual Group Ltd.）2025年连续第二年创下利润纪录。作为非洲资产规模最大的保险公司，该公司在财产保险和财富管理业务方面均实现增长，且其马拉维分公司的回报率也有所提升。【原文：Old Mutual Group Ltd. reported record profit for a second year in 2025 as Africa’s largest insurer by assets saw gains in its general insurance and wealth businesses as well as elevated returns from its Malawian unit.】

item.title: 首席执行官表示，“巨额”IPO将推动菲律宾股市迎来丰收年
item.description: 菲律宾证券交易所首席执行官拉蒙·蒙松表示，多宗“巨额”首次公开募股将推动该交易所今年的募资规模创下历史新高。【原文：A number of “mega” initial public offerings will drive fundraising to a standout year on the Philippines Stock Exchange, Chief Executive Officer Ramon Monzon said.】

item.title: 经霍尔木兹海峡的逃生路线现需绕行伊朗
item.description: 本周早些时候，一艘巴基斯坦油轮紧贴伊朗海岸航行，成为最新一艘驶经霍尔木兹海峡的船只。这表明存在一条经批准的航线，显示出德黑兰对这条狭窄水道控制力的加强——尽管美国正试图对此施加控制。【原文：A Pakistani tanker earlier this week became the latest vessel to sail out through the Strait of Hormuz by hewing closely to the Iranian coast, suggesting an approved route that points to Tehran’s tightening grip on the narrow waterway — even as the US seeks to assert control.】

item.title: 默茨6000亿欧元的国防投资计划正在德国各地引发连锁反应
item.description: 法比安·施密特发现，急于部署其飞机软件的国防客户的需求正呈现激增态势。【原文：Fabian Schmitt is seeing a leap in demand from defense clients eager to deploy his aircraft software.】

item.title: 中国在交易热潮后收紧通往香港IPO的关键渠道
item.description: 据知情人士透露，北京方面正在限制在海外注册的中国企业赴香港进行首次公开募股，此举可能颠覆这一延续数十年的惯例——该惯例曾推动了数十亿美元的股票销售。【原文：Beijing is restricting Chinese companies incorporated overseas from seeking initial public offerings in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter, threatening to upend a decades-old playbook that has fueled billions of dollars in share sales.】

item.title: 特朗普推迟与习近平的峰会，为中国争取了时间来谋划对伊战争
item.description: 唐纳德·特朗普总统要求推迟与中方领导人习近平的峰会，这一举动对北京方面而言或许是个好消息，尽管此举可能给世界两大经济体之间的关系带来新的不确定性。【原文：President Donald Trump’s request for a delay to his summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping is a likely welcome development for Beijing, even as it threatens to inject new uncertainty into ties between the world’s two largest economies.】

item.title: 据称，金融科技公司Upvest在融资中估值达6.4亿欧元
item.description: 德国金融科技公司Upvest（为Revolut等数字银行及零售贷款机构提供经纪技术）在最新一轮融资中筹集了1.25亿美元，现有投资者也参与了本轮融资。【原文：German fintech Upvest, which supplies brokerage technology to neobanks such as Revolut and to retail lenders, raised $125 million in a new funding round that included its existing backers.】

item.title: 尽管政府反对，瑞士人口上限提案仍获得45%的支持率
item.description: 尽管政界人士和商界领袖多次对此表示反对，瑞士右翼人民党提出的将该国人口上限设定为1000万的计划仍获得公众的强烈支持。【原文：A plan by Switzerland’s right-wing People’s Party to cap the country’s population at 10 million still has strong support from the public despite repeated pushback by politicians and business leaders against such a move.】

item.title: 摩根士丹利称南非将维持长期按兵不动
item.description: 摩根士丹利表示，中东冲突引发的油价飙升可能会推高南非通胀率，并导致政策制定者在未来数月内维持利率不变。【原文：Surging oil prices triggered by the Middle East conflict is likely to push South African inflation higher and see policymakers keep interest rates unchanged for months, according to Morgan Stanley.】

item.title: 加拿大亿万富翁史密斯收购《经济学人》杂志26.9%的股份
item.description: 据相关公司透露，加拿大亿万富翁斯蒂芬·史密斯及其家族控股公司已达成协议，将收购《经济学人》杂志出版商的少数股权。【原文：Canadian billionaire Stephen Smith and his family holding company have reached an agreement to acquire a minority stake in the publisher of The Economist magazine, according to the companies.】

item.title: 央行行长们能让伊朗这头“熊”安分下来吗？
item.description:
本周召开会议的18家央行，最初的议程中并没有“战争”这一项。【原文：

The 18 central banks meeting this week didn’t initially have a war on their agendas.

】

item.title: 菲律宾财政部长称油价冲击或将促使4月加息
item.description: 据财政部长弗雷德里克·戈称，如果油价继续上涨，菲律宾央行下个月可能会收紧货币政策。【原文：The Philippine central bank may tighten its monetary policy next month if oil prices continue to rise, according to Finance Secretary Frederick Go.】

item.title: 印度UTI养老基金在经历了一轮股票投资热潮后转向债券
item.description: 在经历了一年大规模买入股票之后，印度第三大养老基金正重返债券市场，这一转变或将为该国饱受重创的债券市场带来一些缓解。【原文：India’s third-largest pension fund is returning to bonds after a year of heavy equity buying, a shift that could bring some relief to the country’s battered debt market.】

item.title: 日本20年期国债发行需求强劲，收益率走高
item.description: 周二，日本20年期国债拍卖需求强劲，因收益率上升吸引了买家，这缓解了市场对油价上涨和通胀风险可能抑制投资意愿的担忧。【原文：Japan’s 20-year government bond auction on Tuesday drew solid demand as higher yields attracted buyers, easing concerns that rising oil prices and inflation risks would damp appetite.】

item.title: 高盛称，原油市场的最大冲击将对炼油产品造成最严重打击
item.description: 高盛集团表示，中东战争引发的史上最大规模石油市场震荡，对航空燃油和柴油等成品油的影响将大于对原油的影响。【原文：The largest oil market shock on record triggered by the war in the Middle East is set to have a greater impact on products such as jet fuel and diesel than on crude, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.】

item.title: 澳大利亚央行在分歧中连续两次加息
item.description: 澳大利亚央行周二连续第二次上调基准利率，以加大对顽固通胀的打击力度，因为伊朗局势升级导致的能源成本上涨，可能加剧物价上涨压力。【原文：Australia’s central bank raised its key interest rate for a second straight meeting on Tuesday, stepping up its battle against stubborn inflation as rising energy costs from the widening war in Iran threaten to intensify price pressures.】

item.title: 随着交易员为中东地区可能出现的更多停电做准备，铝价反弹
item.description: 铝价在连续两日下跌后回升，因伊朗战争持续时间的不确定性加剧了市场对中东地区主要冶炼厂可能进一步减产的担忧。【原文：Aluminum recovered after a two-day slide, as uncertainty over the duration of the Iran war fueled worries about further potential output cuts at major plants across the Middle East.】
